issues.description: DSL is missing the conditional static ability. Card text states 'If you have 3 or less Life cards, this Character gains [Blocker] and +3 cost' — this is a permanent conditional effect that must be represented as a separate effect with trigger 'Always' and condition 'LifeCardsCount' (or equivalent), not part of the OnPlay trigger.

OnPlay effect uses 'FlipLife' but card text says 'add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand' — this is a retrieval action, not a flip. Should be custom action or clarify intent; FlipLife typically means converting life to damage.
OnPlay effect structure is missing 'optional' flag. Card text says 'You may...' indicating this is an optional triggered ability, not mandatory.
